name: Strawberries Italian Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the strawberries and remove the stems.
2. If using peaches, peel them.
3. Cut the peaches into medium-sized pieces.
4. Add all fruit to a bowl and sprinkle with sugar.
5. Add lemon juice, orange juice, Port, and wine.
6. Mix well and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
7. Serve in chilled glass cups.
